js.home: const txt=v=>v==null?'':String(v).replace(/<[^>]*>/g,' ').replace(/ /g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const toUrl=v=>{v=txt(v);if(!v)return '';if(v.startsWith('//'))return 'https:'+v;if(v.startsWith('/'))return env.baseUrl+v;return v};const toMovie=i=>({id:txt(i.vod_id),title:txt(i.vod_name)||'Untitled',cover:toUrl(i.vod_tmdb_poster)||toUrl(i.vod_pic),remark:txt(i.vod_remarks)||txt(i.type_name),desc:txt(i.vod_content)||txt(i.vod_blurb)});const category=txt(env.get('category','1'))||'1';const page=Number(env.get('page',1)||1);const body=await req({url:env.baseUrl+'/api/categories/'+category+'/videos',params:{page:page,limit:20,sort:'-vod_time'},headers:{'x-api-key':'ETMy41jT5qtCFc61Le8rUpTk2MzWGyIP','Cache-Control':'no-cache','Pragma':'no-cache','Accept':'application/json','User-Agent':'247kan-web-client'},noCache:true});const json=JSON.parse(body);return (json.data&&json.data.videos?json.data.videos:[]).map(toMovie);
js.detail: const txt=v=>v==null?'':String(v).replace(/<[^>]*>/g,' ').replace(/ /g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const split=v=>txt(v).split(/[,，、;|/]+/).map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);const toUrl=v=>{v=txt(v);if(!v)return '';if(v.startsWith('//'))return 'https:'+v;if(v.startsWith('/'))return env.baseUrl+v;return v};const movieId=txt(env.get('movieId',''));const body=await req({url:env.baseUrl+'/api/videos/'+movieId,headers:{'x-api-key':'ETMy41jT5qtCFc61Le8rUpTk2MzWGyIP','Cache-Control':'no-cache','Pragma':'no-cache','Accept':'application/json','User-Agent':'247kan-web-client'},noCache:true});const json=JSON.parse(body);const d=json.data||{};const routes=Array.isArray(d.available_routes)?d.available_routes.map(txt).filter(Boolean):[];const eps=Array.isArray(d.episodes)?d.episodes:[];let playlist=routes.map(r=>({title:r,videos:eps.filter(e=>txt(e.route)===r).map(e=>({text:txt(e.name)||('EP'+txt(e.episode)),url:toUrl(e.url)})).filter(v=>v.url)})).filter(g=>g.videos.length>0);if(!playlist.length&&toUrl(d.vod_play_url)){playlist=[{title:'default',videos:[{text:'play',url:toUrl(d.vod_play_url)}]}];}const desc=[txt(d.type_name),txt(d.vod_year),txt(d.vod_area),txt(d.vod_lang),split(d.vod_class).join(' / '),split(d.vod_director).length?('Director: '+split(d.vod_director).join(' / ')):'',split(d.vod_actor).length?('Cast: '+split(d.vod_actor).slice(0,8).join(' / ')):'',txt(d.vod_content)||txt(d.vod_blurb)].filter(Boolean).join('\n');return {id:txt(d.vod_id)||movieId,title:txt(d.vod_name)||'Untitled',cover:toUrl(d.vod_tmdb_poster)||toUrl(d.vod_pic),remark:txt(d.vod_remarks),desc:desc,playlist:playlist};
js.search: const txt=v=>v==null?'':String(v).replace(/<[^>]*>/g,' ').replace(/ /g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const toUrl=v=>{v=txt(v);if(!v)return '';if(v.startsWith('//'))return 'https:'+v;if(v.startsWith('/'))return env.baseUrl+v;return v};const toMovie=i=>({id:txt(i.vod_id),title:txt(i.vod_name)||'Untitled',cover:toUrl(i.vod_tmdb_poster)||toUrl(i.vod_pic),remark:txt(i.vod_remarks)||txt(i.type_name),desc:txt(i.vod_content)||txt(i.vod_blurb)});const keyword=txt(env.get('keyword',''));const page=Number(env.get('page',1)||1);if(!keyword)return [];const body=await req({url:'https://meilisearch.247kan.com/indexes/videos/search',method:'POST',headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer Ub-lWdJKpjLqIHIayy8b0m1Nc49HMqOZr0U5jt7UPZM','X-Meili-API-Key':'Ub-lWdJKpjLqIHIayy8b0m1Nc49HMqOZr0U5jt7UPZM','Accept':'application/json','Content-Type':'application/json','User-Agent':'247kan-web-client'},bodyType:'json',data:{q:keyword,limit:20,offset:(page-1)*20,attributesToRetrieve:['vod_id','vod_name','vod_pic','vod_tmdb_poster','vod_douban_score','vod_year','vod_remarks','vod_actor','vod_director','vod_area','vod_lang','vod_content','vod_class','type_name']},noCache:true});const json=JSON.parse(body);return (json.hits||[]).map(toMovie);
